infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to the microphone to create notes via voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app uses speech recognition to convert your voice into text notes.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This app needs access to your calendar to sync your notes with a date.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: This app needs access to your reminders.

plugins.microphonePermission: Permite el uso del micrófono para crear notas con tu voz.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Permite convertir tu voz en texto para las notas.
